user_goal: Replicate Stremio-like Plex browsing with live Torrentio/Real-Debrid streaming first, and request/materialized playback as fallback.

architecture.catalog_click_detection: Plex play queue watcher promotes catalog placeholders to REQUESTED
architecture.resolution: Live proxy resolves cached Debrid streams first; request/materialize and Arr/qBittorrent/Decypharr lanes are fallback.
architecture.playback_contract: Live playback must be cached Debrid, not RD download placeholder, HEAD 200, Range 206, media-sized Content-Length, and Plex-facing application/octet-stream.
architecture.catalog_growth: Rolling TMDb seeding with Plex folder lanes under _Catalog
architecture.self_verification: Scheduled live self-test validates HEAD, Range, and minimum real-media size. Plex DB checks confirm indexed live entries and retired stale entries.
architecture.live_lane: Primary Streaming-library catalog lane: .strm entries point to the ScarFLIX live proxy, which resolves cached Torrentio/Real-Debrid streams at play time.
architecture.source_selection: Prefer 720p/1080p H.264-style cached streams; demote 4K, HEVC/x265, remux, DV/HDR, and cam-style sources.

completed.e2e_success_item: D:\ScarFLIX\Wishlist\Movies\Night of the Living Dead E2E (1968)

next_work: Continue rolling live catalog coverage through scheduled TMDb seeding.
Improve source ranking and compatibility scoring using cached stream metadata and admission results.
Route no-live-source titles to Decypharr/Zurg/Radarr/Sonarr materialization fallback.
Monitor Plex DB size and scan duration as catalog count grows.
